title: 11 Herbal Creams For Eye Pain
description: Calendula officinalis creams contains triterpenoid saponins, particularly calendulin, and sesquiterpene lactones, like dihydroxyacetylsalicylic acid. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and soothing properties, which help reduce swelling and irritation in the eyes. The triterpenoids also have antimicrobial properties, making them effective against bacterial infections that may cause eye pain. Additionally, the sesquiterpene lactones have analgesic and antispasmodic properties, which...
